item.title: Frankie’s Fun Park Mini Golf: Holes 28-30
item.description: Watch Holes 28-30 at Frankie’s Fun Park mini golf. Challenging shots, fun obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts make this round a thrilling experience.

media:content.media:title: Frankie’s Fun Park Mini Golf: Holes 28-30
media:content.media:description: Watch Holes 28-30 at Frankie’s Fun Park mini golf. Challenging shots, fun obstacles, and exciting hole-in-one attempts make this round a thrilling experience.

item.title: I Think I Aced That Shot
item.description: Watch an impressive mini golf shot that may just be a hole-in-one. Precision, skill, and excitement come together for this satisfying moment on the course.

media:content.media:title: I Think I Aced That Shot
media:content.media:description: Watch an impressive mini golf shot that may just be a hole-in-one. Precision, skill, and excitement come together for this satisfying moment on the course.
